zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Baird於1460年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Baird I26歲，母親Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas26歲。他於1474年與Janet Ray Posso在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年53歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Baird
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from a common pronunciation of   Bard   in Scotland.
occupational name from Gaelic bàrd ‘bard, poet, minstrel’, or of Gaelic Mac an Baird ‘son of the bard’.

variants.name: Bard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Aime, Alphonse, Alphy, Armand, Cecile, Celestine, Emile, Fernand, Germaine, Gilles, Jacques.

English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Old French personal name Bard(e), ancient Germanic Bardo, from barta ‘battle axe’. This was borne as a surname by a prominent Norman family with lands in west Normandy and in various English and Scottish counties, including Essex, Hertfordshire, North Yorkshire, Northumberland, and Lanarkshire. In Scotland the original family were Norman landowners in Strathaven parish in Lanarkshire. They were descended from the Baards, lords of Loftus in the North Yorkshire, descendants of the mid 12th-century Richard Baart.
Irish: altered form of either   Beard   or   Baird  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Baird was born on 1 January 1460, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Gilbert Baird I, was 26 and his mother, Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas, was 26. He married Janet Ray Posso in 1474, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Baird est né le 1 janvier 1460, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, Sir Gilbert Baird I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Janet Ray Posso en 1474, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Baird am 1. Januar 1460 in Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gilbert Baird I 26 und seine Mutter Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas 26. Er hat 1474 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Janet Ray Posso geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England und wurde in Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Baird è nato il il 1 gennaio 1460 nel Peeblesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Gilbert Baird I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Janet Ray Posso nel 1474, nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Bairdが1460年1月1日にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert Baird Iは26歳，母Lilly Baird of Ordinhivasは26歳であった。1474年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスでJanet Ray Possoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで53歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Baird(이)가 1460년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 피블레실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Baird I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 Janet Ray Posso(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Baird nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1460, em Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Gilbert Baird I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Ray Posso em 1474, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ro.The Inch, , Midlothian, Scotland: The Inch, Midlothian, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Baird родился 1 января 1460 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Baird I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lilly Baird of Ordinhivas, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Ray Posso в 1474 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности нортумбирланд, Англия.
